action.reasoning: Observation: 3-model ensemble (best+m1+m3) tied previous best at 0.8595. Few-shot dropped slightly (0.7926 vs 0.7981). Analysis: We've plateaued around 0.859. ~2.4h, 9 iters left. Could try: train a 4th diverse model (different arch like ConvNeXt-Small or different aug) to add. Also class-balanced sampling fine-tune (cRT) often helps few-shot. Decision: Train a 4th model with different seed and slightly stronger LA_TAU=1.2 to boost few-shot, save as m2.pt (replacing weak one). Then ensemble best+m1+m2(new)+m3.
action.command: SEED=777 LA_TAU=1.2 EPOCHS=18 SAVE_NAME=m2.pt python train3.py
